header.set_shop_name_first: Set your shop name in settings first.

dashboard.no_data: No data to display. Start by adding some products and orders!
dashboard.load_error: We couldn't load your dashboard. Please check your connection and try again.
dashboard.quick_sync_desc: Pull latest products & prices from Instagram
dashboard.check_orders_desc: View and manage pending customer orders
dashboard.chart_description: Revenue, clients, and orders over time.
dashboard.chart_empty: No sales in this period yet
dashboard.chart_empty_hint: Orders will appear here as they come in.
dashboard.share_link_not_ready: Your shop link isn't ready yet.
dashboard.share_link_copy_failed: Couldn't copy the link. Please copy it from Settings.
dashboard.ig_connected: Instagram connected! You can now import your posts as products.
dashboard.images_up_to_date: All images are up to date.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.no_orders_desc: New orders will show up here as they come in.
notifications.no_activity_desc: Recent orders and stock alerts will appear here.
notifications.low_on_stock: Product {{name}} is low on stock ({{count}} left)

sync.waiting_ai: Waiting for the system's analysis results…
sync.waiting_ai_desc: Products will appear here as they're processed
sync.no_products_processed: No products were created or updated
sync.created_appearing: Products will appear as they're created…
sync.summary_desc: Here is a summary of the sync process.
sync.failed_desc: The sync process failed. See the error message below.

products.filter_visibility_hint: Choose which filters are available on this page.
products.quick_sync_hint: Imports only new Instagram posts — skips posts you've already imported. Fast.
products.full_sync_hint: Re-scans all your Instagram posts and re-analyzes them with the system. Slower and uses more system credits.
products.no_match_desc: Try broadening your search or removing some active filters to see more results.
products.no_products_desc: Import products from your Instagram posts or run a full sync to get started.
products.shop_not_ready: Your shop isn't ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
products.create_failed: Couldn't create the product. Please try again.
products.delete_failed: Couldn't delete the product. Please try again.
products.delete_one_desc: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
products.delete_one_desc_generic: This product will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
products.draft_banner_desc: — drafts don't appear on your storefront. Review them, or publish everything now.
products.publish_drafts_failed: Couldn't publish the drafts — try again.
products.load_error_desc: Something went wrong loading your products. Check your connection and try again.

orders.no_match_desc: Try adjusting your search or date range.
orders.no_orders_desc: Orders placed through your shop will appear here.
orders.cancel_confirm_desc: The reserved stock will be returned to your inventory. This can't be undone.

stock.title: Stock Management
stock.no_products_desc: Physical products you add will show up here so you can track and adjust their stock.
stock.no_match_desc: No products match your current search and filters.
stock.zero_out_confirm_desc: This sets inventory to 0 for the selected variants. You can undo right after.

categories.title: Categories & Types
categories.duplicate_hint: Duplicate a system template or create a new one.
categories.add_hint: Add a category to get started.
categories.delete_type_desc: This will permanently remove this type template.
categories.rename_category_desc: Change the name of this category.
categories.new_category_desc: Enter a name for the new category.
categories.new_type_desc: Add a new type to the "{{category}}" category.
categories.specs_hint: Details buyers see and the system reads to classify products.
categories.options_hint: Choices like size or color that generate product variants.
categories.system_delete_hint: System templates can't be deleted. Duplicate first.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your social accounts to import content and enable features.
integrations.must_login_connect: You must be logged in to connect Instagram.
integrations.disconnect_desc: Your shop will stop syncing new Instagram posts and importing products. Your existing products stay. You can reconnect anytime.
integrations.prompt_desc: To get started, we need to securely connect to your Instagram Business account. This allows us to import your posts and turn them into products.
integrations.permissions_intro: We'll ask for the following permissions:
integrations.perm_profile_desc: To create your account with your name and profile picture.
integrations.perm_email_desc: To securely log you into your dashboard.
integrations.perm_media_desc: To access your posts, allowing you to import them as products.
integrations.permissions_note: We only request the permissions necessary to provide our services. We will never post on your behalf without your explicit action.
integrations.not_authenticated: User not authenticated. Please log in first.

keywords.title: System Keywords
keywords.description: Keywords teach the system to recognise patterns in Instagram captions and extract structured product data automatically.
keywords.suggested_desc: Common Albanian/English abbreviations used in product captions. Click to add.
keywords.your_keywords_desc: Click any keyword or description to edit it inline. The system extracts the text following the keyword based on your description.
keywords.delete_confirm_desc: "{{keyword}}" will be removed and the system will no longer use it when analyzing your posts.
keywords.no_keywords_table: No keywords added yet. Add one above or pick from the suggestions.
keywords.modal_desc: Define a keyword and tell the system how to interpret the information that follows it in a caption.
keywords.desc_placeholder: e.g., The fabric or substance the product is made of.
keywords.empty_desc: Keywords teach the system what to look for in your captions — like price markers, sizes, or colors — so it extracts product details more accurately.
keywords.no_match_desc: Nothing matches "{{search}}". Try a different term.

promotions.page_desc: Manage your marketing campaigns, discounts, and special offers.
promotions.no_promotions_desc: Create your first promotion — a percentage discount, a fixed amount off, or free shipping — to drive more sales.
promotions.delete_warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the selected item.
promotions.announcements_desc: Scrolling messages displayed on your storefront homepage.
promotions.your_announcements_desc: These messages appear in a scrolling banner on your storefront.
promotions.off_schedule_warning: None of your enabled announcements are within their scheduled dates today, so the storefront bar is hidden. Edit an announcement and clear its dates (or set the repeat to “None”) to show it now.
promotions.update_failed: Couldn't update the promotion. Please try again.
promotions.announcement_update_failed: Couldn't update the announcement. Please try again.
promotions.reorder_failed: Couldn't reorder the announcement. Please try again.
promotions.delete_failed: Couldn't delete the promotion. Please try again.
promotions.announcement_delete_failed: Couldn't delete the announcement. Please try again.

settings.synced_fb_desc: Some profile details may be synced from your connected Facebook account.
settings.profile_desc: Your personal information on this account.
settings.new_sale_notif_desc: Get an email every time you make a sale.
settings.weekly_summary_desc: Receive a summary of your weekly performance.
settings.delete_warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.shop_details_desc: This information is displayed on your storefront and in communications.
settings.shop_name_required: Shop name is required — it's used in your shop link.
settings.headline: Headline
settings.read_only_desc: To update this info, make changes in your Instagram app, then click refresh.
settings.delete_account_desc: This permanently deletes your account, your shop, products, and orders. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_account_failed: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again or contact support.
settings.profile_readonly_hint: These details come from your connected account. To change them, update your Instagram profile, then refresh.
settings.shop_save_failed: Couldn't save your shop details. Please try again.
settings.url_copy_failed: Failed to copy URL. Please try again manually.

appearance.custom_hint: You're using custom settings. Save them as a new theme!
appearance.branding_desc: Get inspired with a random theme or choose from presets.
appearance.layout_desc: Control the structure and shape of the UI.
appearance.typography_desc: Choose a font pairing that matches your brand's voice.
appearance.bg_effects_desc: Customize the application background and visual effects.
appearance.glassmorphism_desc: Apply a frosted glass effect to UI elements.
appearance.hero_bg_desc: Customize the background of your storefront's hero section.
appearance.enable_advanced_desc: This will allow you to override the preset theme with your own custom values. You can always reset to the default themes later if you change your mind.

announcement_editor.modal_desc: Create a scrolling message for your storefront.
announcement_editor.message_placeholder: e.g., Flash Sale! Get 20% off all items this week!
announcement_editor.display_order_int: Display order must be a non-negative integer
announcement_editor.preview_placeholder: Your announcement message will appear here.
announcement_editor.check_fields: Please check the announcement fields and try again.

billing.trial_hint: Pick a plan below so your shop never stops.
billing.locked_hint: Your account is limited — choose a plan below to reactivate your shop.
billing.trial_setup_hint: Start your 7-day free trial — no card required.
billing.switch_effect: The new plan takes effect immediately and is paid now via secure checkout.
billing.switch_no_refund: The remaining time on your current paid period is not refunded — the new plan replaces it.
billing.trial_hint_tiered: Your trial mirrors this tier exactly — what you see now is what you get after subscribing. You can switch your trial tier below; the remaining time recalculates automatically.
billing.trial_pick_hint: Choose your free trial below: Business for 7 days, Pro for 14 days, or Starter for 1 month. Each trial works exactly like the paid tier.
billing.trial_already_used: Your account has already used its free trial.
billing.over_limit_desc: You have {{count}} active products, but this tier allows up to {{limit}}. Switching would take your shop offline above that limit — that's why it's not possible.
billing.over_limit_pick: Pick a tier that fits your catalog, or reduce your active products first.

studio.visibleLabel: What visitors see at your shop link
studio.pickColourHint: Or pick your favourite colour — we'll build a matching palette (light & dark).
studio.stickyHeader: Keep header on top when scrolling
studio.filterVisibilityCount: {{visible}} of {{total}} filter groups shown to customers
studio.filterVisibilityHint: Choose which filters customers can use on your shop page — price, availability, reviews, options, specifications… Changes save with your design.
studio.layoutHelp: Drag to reorder. Toggle to show or hide a section. Expand any section to change its layout and content — every change previews live instantly.
studio.galleryTip: Tip: the product gallery position (side, top, sticky, full-bleed) is set under Style → Pages.
studio.heroBgHint: Paste an image or video URL for the hero background — leave empty to use your product photos.
studio.resetBody: This replaces every colour, font, layout and section with the default look. This can't be undone.

gate.title: Custom storefront is a Business feature
gate.body: Design a fully branded shop — your own colours, fonts, layouts, hero, product pages and cart — with the Storefront Studio. Upgrade to Business to unlock it.

onboarding.s1Blurb: Let's set up your shop's look in a minute. Pick what you like at each step — you can change anything later. Everything updates live once you finish.
onboarding.s2Blurb: Each template is a ready-made look. Pick the closest one — it sets colours, fonts and layout together. You can fine-tune everything next.
onboarding.s3Blurb: Your brand colour palette, and whether the shop shows in light, dark, or follows the visitor's device (Auto).
onboarding.s4Blurb: How rounded the corners are across your whole shop — from sharp and modern to soft, rounded, or fully pill-shaped.
onboarding.s5Blurb: A curated font pairing for your headings and body text. Each preview shows the actual typefaces.
onboarding.s6Blurb: The big building blocks: your hero banner, the navigation bar, and the footer. Each thumbnail shows the shape of the layout.
onboarding.s7Blurb: How products and buttons look. The card style sets how every product appears in your shop grid.
onboarding.s8Blurb: How much motion your shop has as visitors scroll and hover — from none to expressive.
onboarding.s9Blurb: Your first design is ready. Explore the full editor any time to refine every detail — and use the live preview to click through your shop.

studio.general_desc: Design that applies everywhere — colors, light/dark, fonts, roundedness, glass, motion, components.
studio.homepage_desc: Navbar, every section and the footer — toggle visibility, drag to reorder, expand to style.
studio.shop_page_desc: The all-products listing — filters and layout.
studio.product_page_desc: Gallery layout and the blocks shown on every product page.
studio.my_templates_desc: Save your current design and reuse it any time.
studio.homepage_intro: Toggle any part on or off, drag sections to reorder them on your storefront, expand to pick a layout and edit content.
studio.announcements_hint: Global on/off for the announcement section
studio.bottom_bar_hint: Off = a hamburger menu appears in the navbar on phones
studio.available_filters_desc: {{visible}} of {{total}} filter groups shown to customers — price, availability, reviews, options, specifications…
studio.product_sections_hint: The gallery and info blocks sit side by side on desktop; the rest render below.
studio.cart_page_hint: Your cart opens as its own page (change under General → Components → Cart).
studio.colors_dark_active: Colors (dark mode — what visitors see now)
studio.wcag_hint: Badges show the WCAG contrast grade. Changing a surface re-derives its text automatically; the Text pickers override that manually.
studio.auto_light_hint: Used when a visitor prefers light mode.
studio.dark_shop_light_hint: Not shown while your shop is set to dark.
studio.dark_overrides_hint: Overrides used when the storefront renders dark (auto follows the visitor).
studio.tinted_shadows_hint: Color the shadows instead of neutral gray
studio.no_saved_designs: No saved designs yet — tweak the storefront, then save it here (or with the bookmark button in the toolbar).
studio.surprise_toast: Surprise! Undo brings your design back.
studio.ig_look_fixed_1: This look is fixed. Switch to
studio.save_shop_name_preview: Save your shop name to preview.
studio.save_design_desc: Stores your current design in “My templates” so you can come back to it any time.
studio.apply_template_desc: Applying a template replaces your current colors, fonts, layout and sections with the template's design. Any tweaks you've made will be overwritten.

promotions.title: Promotions are a Pro feature
promotions.body: Upgrade to Pro to create discounts, offers and storefront announcements that drive sales.

app_ui.error_description: This page hit an unexpected error. Your data is safe — reloading usually fixes it.

variants.not_signed_in: You're not signed in. Please sign in to save options and variants.
variants.no_options_desc: Add an option like Size or Color to generate variants.
variants.bulk_add_placeholder: Type values and press Enter — e.g. S, M, L
variants.footer_note: Variant price = base + option adjustments, shown in {{currency}}. Saving syncs the product's total stock automatically.

product_editor.validation_name_min: Name must be at least 3 characters
product_editor.validation_price_positive: Price must be a positive number
product_editor.validation_inventory_nonneg: Inventory must be a non-negative integer
product_editor.must_login_upload: You must be logged in to upload an image.
product_editor.clear_cache_failed: Failed to clear the system's analysis cache: {{message}}
product_editor.dialog_desc: View or edit product details for {{name}}.
product_editor.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the product.
product_editor.discard_desc: You have unsaved changes to this product. If you leave now, they'll be lost.

reviews_mgr.title: Reviews — {{name}}
reviews_mgr.summary_one: {{avg}} average · {{count}} review. Replies are shown publicly on your storefront.
reviews_mgr.summary_other: {{avg}} average · {{count}} reviews. Replies are shown publicly on your storefront.
reviews_mgr.no_reviews_desc: Customers can review from “My Orders” once their order is fulfilled.

product_edit.no_specs_desc: Click "Find with the system" or add manually below.
product_edit.save_first_desc: Save this product to start adding options and variants.
product_edit.save_before_analyzing: Please save the product before analyzing so variants can be created.
product_edit.specs_found: The system found {{items}} — check the Variants tab.
product_edit.no_details_found: No additional details found for this product.

products_ui.name: Name
products_ui.add_color_placeholder: Add color name (e.g., Red, Navy Blue)

studio_panels.save_shop_name_to_preview: Save your shop name to preview.

studio_panels.login_to_upload_media: You must be logged in to upload media.
studio_panels.show_blob_animation_desc: Adds a subtle, animated background effect to the hero section.

ig_post_modal.title: Import from Instagram
ig_post_modal.no_posts_desc: Refresh to pull the latest posts from your connected Instagram account.
ig_post_modal.without_analysis_title: Create the product without applying the system's analysis
ig_post_modal.apply_analysis_warning: Product created, but some details (specs/options) could not be saved — use "Find with the system" in the editor.
ig_post_modal.system_analyzing: The system is analyzing the post...
ig_post_modal.not_product_post: The system determined this is not a product post.
ig_post_modal.select_post_desc: Choose a post to preview and import it as a product.
ig_post_modal.post_preview_desc: Full-size preview of the selected Instagram post.

promo_editor.discount_value_required: Discount value must be greater than 0.
promo_editor.min_order_required: Minimum order value is required for free shipping.
promo_editor.check_fields: Please check the promotion fields and try again.
promo_editor.dialog_desc: Define your marketing campaigns, discounts, and special offers.
promo_editor.min_order_label: Minimum Order Value for Free Shipping
promo_editor.target_products_desc: Select specific products this promotion applies to. Leave empty to apply to all products.
promo_editor.banner_desc: Also display this promotion as a scrolling announcement on your shop.
promo_editor.select_products_desc: Choose which products this promotion applies to.

order_detail.cancel_order_desc: The reserved stock will be returned to your inventory. This can't be undone.
order_detail.placed_on: Details for the order placed on {{date}}.
order_detail.reply_placeholder: Type your response to the customer here...
order_detail.no_dispute: No dispute reported for this order.

sale_modal.title: Apply Sale to {{count}} Products
sale_modal.description: Set a discount that will be applied to the current price of the selected products. This action cannot be undone.

admin_page.search_placeholder: Search by email, name or shop…

ig_shop.no_products_filtered: No products match your current filters or search criteria.
ig_shop.no_products_yet: It looks like this store doesn't have any products yet.

get_started.title: Let's set up your shop
get_started.subtitle: A few quick steps and you'll be ready to sell.
get_started.connect_desc: Link your Instagram Business account so we can turn your posts into products.
get_started.products_desc: Import them from Instagram, or add a product by hand.
get_started.share_desc: Copy your shop link and send it to your customers.

misc.ig_guide_desc: To use Vela, your Instagram account must be a professional (Business or Creator) account. You'll log in with your Instagram credentials — no Facebook account needed.
misc.ig_guide_s1_pre: In your Instagram mobile app, go to
misc.ig_guide_s1_path: Settings and privacy > Account type and tools > Switch to professional account
misc.ig_guide_s2_pre: Click Connect below and log in with your Instagram username and password. Linking a Facebook Page is no longer required — you can manage it later from
misc.ig_guide_s3_pre: When you click "Connect" below, Instagram will ask for permissions.
misc.ig_guide_s3_strong: Make sure you allow ALL requested permissions
misc.ig_guide_s3_post: so Vela can read your posts and publish products for you. Without them, the integration will fail.
misc.ig_guide_help_desc: If you're still having trouble, Instagram's official guide can walk you through it.
misc.login_welcome: Welcome back! Taking you to your dashboard…
misc.login_failed: Couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
misc.forgot_enter_email: Enter a valid email above first, then tap “Forgot password?”.
misc.reset_email_sent: Password reset link sent — check your email.
misc.register_confirm_email: Almost there! We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to finish setting up your shop.
misc.register_failed: Couldn't create your account. Please try again.
misc.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
misc.reset_pw_failed: Couldn't update your password. Please request a new reset link.
misc.reset_pw_success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
misc.reset_pw_done: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to sign in…
misc.reset_link_invalid: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one from the login page.

ig_publish.title: Publish to Instagram
ig_publish.description: The system writes the caption from the product's details — review it, pick the photo, and post.
ig_publish.live: Your post is live on Instagram.
ig_publish.already_published: This product is already linked to an Instagram post — publishing again creates a new post.
ig_publish.no_image: This product has no image to post. Add one first.
ig_publish.reconnect_needed: Instagram needs to be reconnected to allow publishing (a new permission is required).
ig_publish.removed_unlinked: Unlinked from the shop. Instagram doesn't let apps delete posts — the post was opened so you can archive it there.
ig_publish.gaps_filled: The system completed missing product details from the post: {{fields}}.
ig_publish.video_rendering: The system is rendering the video in the background — you can keep this open or come back.
ig_publish.video_ready: Video ready — publish when you like.
ig_publish.video_failed: Video render failed. Pick another type or try again.

wizard.title: Add a product
wizard.name: Product name
wizard.specs_hint: Facts customers look for — material, dimensions, weight, care. Skip this step if none apply.
wizard.options_hint: Variations customers choose from. Separate values with | (e.g. S | M | L).
wizard.review_hint: The product, its specifications and options will be created and structured automatically.

import.title: Import from file
import.description: Upload any CSV or Excel file — the system reads the columns itself and creates products with images, specifications and options.
import.drop_hint: Click to choose a .csv or .xlsx file
import.skipped: ({{count}} rows skipped — missing name or price.)
import.no_valid_rows: No valid rows found. Check that the file has 'name' and 'price' columns.
import.ready_ai: {{count}} rows found — the system will read, structure and create the products automatically.
import.ai_working: The system is reading your file and building the products…

ig_studio.title: Instagram Studio
ig_studio.subtitle: Design how your products look when the system posts them to Instagram.
ig_studio.templates_desc: Pick the design applied over your product media when publishing.
ig_studio.caption_style_desc: How the system writes captions when publishing products.
ig_studio.preview_desc: How each media type will look with your current design.
ig_studio.carousel_hint: One connected design — the ribbon, baseline and arrows flow across the slides as you swipe.
ig_studio.video_hint: Videos currently publish plain; animated overlays are on the way.
ig_studio.media_desc: Zoom, position and clean up the photo before the design goes on top.
ig_studio.remove_bg_hint: Cuts the product out — perfect for Spotlight & Catalog.
ig_studio.general_desc: Shared by every content type — colors, labels, caption style and how the product photo sits.
ig_studio.preview_ig_desc: Exactly how this content type will look on Instagram.
ig_studio.vid_queued_toast: Video queued — it renders in the background.
ig_studio.vid_async_hint: Videos render in the background — you can leave this page; the result appears here and in your media.

bulk_publish.title: Choose what to generate and post
bulk_publish.subtitle: Drag products from the stack onto the column of the post type you want the system to generate.
bulk_publish.stack_hint: {{count}} left — drag the top card to a column, or fling it to cycle.
bulk_publish.queued: Bulk publishing started — follow it in the process widget.
